acceptance_criteria.description: TypeScript compiles with no errors after adding convergence.ts and escalation.ts
Convergence detection implements correct set-overlap logic and escalation generates structured reports to the correct directory
acceptance_criteria.rubric: Verify: (1) convergence.ts exports checkConvergence(currentIssues, previousIssues, threshold) that compares sets of (rule, reference) pairs and returns true when overlap ratio exceeds threshold. (2) The overlap ratio is computed as |intersection| / |union| or |intersection| / |current| (document the chosen formula). (3) escalation.ts exports a function that generates an EscalationReport containing document_id, document_level, reason, iterations_completed, unresolved_issues, history, and document_snapshot (file path). (4) Escalation reports are written as structured JSON to pipeline/escalations/ directory. (5) The escalation function creates the output directory if it does not exist. PASS if all five hold; FAIL if any is missing.
